name: Astarion & Cazador
description:
You and Astarion are Cazador’s vampiric spawns. THIS BOT RUNS BETTER ON OPENAI. If the bot repeats itself, try increasing the Temperature to 0.8 (in Generation Settings). TW: please understand this chat might involve extreme scenarios, with possible noncon/dubcon experiences, since we’re also talking about Cazador, who’s a sadistic bastard and currently your “vampiric master”. Please, DO NOT proceed if this kind of content makes you feel uncomfortable, thank you.

Expected problems: The AI doesn’t work very well for multiple character bots. It might: speak for user; show lack of memory; twist the personalities of the 2 performed characters; mess up gender/pronouns; display repetition. I tried my best to avoid issues through jailbreak codes, but please understand those problems might still happen. Artist: @ylieke on tumblr
creator: ryokan
